paths.__comment_zstack_paths: Point to the raw z-stack directory. One per concatenation group (one per data folder works too). If not used, can be removed entirely or left empty.

params_mcorr.__comment: Motion correction parameters. Only 'caiman' is supported as method. Delete 'z_motion_correction' block entirely to skip z-motion correction.
params_mcorr.__comment_save_mcorr_movie: Accepted: 'tiff' (recommended); 'h5' and 'bin' exist but may not work in all workflows.

z_motion_correction.__comment: Set 'non_rigid' to true to compute f-anat non-rigid. If false, will only compute a rigid z-position.

params_extraction.__comment: ROI extraction method choices after motion correction.

__suite2p_parameter_options.__comment: Add any Suite2p ops key under 'main' to override Suite2p defaults at ops creation. Keep 'decay_time' (or 'tau') as the minimum required field.
__suite2p_parameter_options.decay_time_or_tau: Calcium decay time in seconds (mapped to Suite2p 'tau').
__suite2p_parameter_options.threshold_scaling: Detection threshold multiplier; lower finds more ROIs.
__suite2p_parameter_options.max_overlap: Maximum allowed ROI overlap before rejection.
__suite2p_parameter_options.inner_neuropil_radius: Pixels excluded around ROI for neuropil estimate.
__suite2p_parameter_options.do_registration: 1/0 or true/false to enable/disable registration in Suite2p step.
__suite2p_parameter_options.maxregshift: Maximum rigid registration shift (fraction of frame size).

logging.__comment: Where pipeline log files are stored (defaults to export parent).
